# kSecPropertyKeyType

**Global Variable**

A key whose value indicates the type of certificate property.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecPropertyKeyType: CFString
```

## Discussion

Possible values for this key are described in [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/certificate-property-type-values].
